title: MemCube
description: Sgraal MemCube — standardized memory entry format for AI agent memory governance.

id.description: Unique identifier for this memory entry.

content.description: The memory content — what the agent remembers.

type.description: Category of memory, affecting how risk is interpreted.

timestamp_age_days.description: Age of the memory in days since last confirmed accurate.

source_trust.description: Trust score for the memory source (0.0 = untrusted, 1.0 = fully trusted).

source_conflict.description: Dempster-Shafer K conflict coefficient. Measures contradiction between sources (0.0 = no conflict, 1.0 = total contradiction).

downstream_count.description: Number of downstream decisions or actions that depend on this memory. Measures blast radius.

goal_id.description: Optional. Links this memory to a specific agent goal or task.

provenance.description: Optional. Chain of custody — how this memory was derived or transformed.

gsv.description: Optional. Global Schema Version — tracks which version of the memory schema produced this entry.

context_tags.description: Optional. Tags for filtering and grouping memories (e.g. ['onboarding', 'billing', 'eu-region']).

geo_tag.description: Optional. Geographic context for jurisdiction-sensitive memories (e.g. 'EU', 'US-CA', 'HU-BU').
